criteria.description: Mobile (<768px): sidebar hidden, accessible via hamburger drawer
criteria.evidence: Hamburger button with md:hidden renders only on <768px. Aside uses -translate-x-full (hidden) unless drawerOpen=true.

criteria.description: Board shows one column at a time with tab navigation on mobile
criteria.evidence: Board.tsx renders tab bar (md:hidden) and single-column panel (md:hidden). Tab click sets activeTab state.

criteria.description: Tablet (768-1024px): sidebar shows as 56px icon rail
criteria.evidence: At md breakpoint: aside is md:w-14 (56px), icon rail div is hidden md:flex lg:hidden.
At lg breakpoint: aside is lg:w-[280px], board grid is lg:grid-cols-3 (same as before).

criteria.description: No horizontal overflow on any viewport
criteria.evidence: Build passes. No fixed-width elements outside of the controlled breakpoint widths.

criteria.description: Drawer closes when backdrop tapped or group selected
criteria.evidence: Backdrop onClick calls setDrawerOpen(false). GroupManager onGroupSelect calls setDrawerOpen(false).
